name: Breast of Chicken Magnifique
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a large frying pan with a lid.
2. Brown the chicken in butter; remove from the frying pan.
3. Brown mushrooms in the pan.
4. Stir in soup, garlic, and seasonings. Add the browned chicken.
5. Cover and cook over low heat for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Blend in cream; heat slowly.
7. Serve with noodles.
From: Ellen Cleary
Bobbie Beers' Variations:
Instead of Cream of Chicken Soup, use Cream of Mushroom Soup.
To make it lower in fat, substitute the same amount of skim milk for Half and half.
Use rice or mashed potatoes instead of noodles.
